---
title: "03 多因素logistic回归"
date: "2026-04-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

# 本课概览
目标：搭建多因素模型，能讲清楚“调整后 OR”的含义
核心内容：
    建立多因素模型：glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, family=binomial())
    共线性
输出：多因素OR表

## 数据导入
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
data = read.csv("./data/metabric_cleaned_1500.csv")

```
## 核心变量选择 & 分类与连续变量处理
```{r}
data_analysis <- data %>% select(PATIENT_ID, TreatmentOutcome, AGE_AT_DIAGNOSIS,
                          LATERALITY, ER_STATUS, HER2_STATUS, TUMOR_STAGE) %>% 
                          mutate(TreatmentOutcome = factor(TreatmentOutcome),
                                 LATERALITY = factor(LATERALITY),
                                 ER_STATUS = factor(ER_STATUS),
                                 HER2_STATUS = factor(HER2_STATUS),
                                 TUMOR_STAGE = factor(TUMOR_STAGE))
```
## 数据清理 - 删除含有NA的行
```{r}
data_analysis <- data_analysis %>% drop_na(LATERALITY, HER2_STATUS, TUMOR_STAGE)
```
## 多因素建模
```{r}
model_multi <- glm(TreatmentOutcome ~ AGE_AT_DIAGNOSIS +
                     ER_STATUS + 
                     HER2_STATUS + 
                     TUMOR_STAGE, family = binomial(), data = data_analysis)
summary(model_multi)
```
# 提取数据并分析
```{r}
C1 <- exp(model_multi[["coefficients"]])
C2 <- exp(confint(model_multi))[,1]
C3 <- exp(confint(model_multi))[,2]
P <- summary(model_multi)$coefficients[,4]
```
# 结果打包
```{r}
result <- data.frame(C1, C2, C3, P)
names(result) <- c("OR", "LCI", "UCI", "P")
result
```
# 豆师傅版本
```{r}
# 提取 OR、95%CI、P 值 → 生成标准四列表
library(broom)

result_multi <- tidy(
  model_multi,
  conf.int = TRUE,    # 自动算95%CI
  exponentiate = TRUE # 自动变 OR
) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%  # 去掉截距
  select(
    变量 = term,
    OR = estimate,
    下限 = conf.low,
    上限 = conf.high,
    P值 = p.value
  )

# 查看结果
result_multi
```
# ChatGPT结果
```{r}
# 提取结果
coef_summary <- summary(model_multi)$coefficients

# 计算 OR 和 CI
OR  <- exp(coef(model_multi))
CI  <- exp(confint(model_multi))  # 默认 profile likelihood

# 组织成表
result_table <- data.frame(
  Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
  OR = OR,
  CI_lower = CI[, 1],
  CI_upper = CI[, 2],
  P_value = coef_summary[, 4]
)

# 查看结果
print(result_table)
```
# ChatGPT - tidyverse风格
```{r}
library(broom)

result_table <- tidy(model_multi, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)

result_table <- result_table[, c("term", "estimate", "conf.low", "conf.high", "p.value")]

colnames(result_table) <- c("Variable", "OR", "CI_lower", "CI_upper", "P_value")

print(result_table)
```
